title: Existence of successor
doc_html:
CHAPTER 5.  LOSS OF SUCCESSION RIGHTS

Art. 939.  Existence of successor

A successor must exist at the death of the decedent.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
